source_item.title: China's Kimi K3 rattles US AI industry

slide1_hook.label: China's Kimi Just Dethroned America's Best AI
slide1_hook.subhead: A 3-year-old startup just hit #1 in AI coding.

slide2_backstory.label: THE BACKSTORY
slide2_backstory.headline: From Zero to China's Hottest AI Lab
slide2_backstory.body: Moonshot AI started in 2023, led by ex-Google researcher Yang Zhilin. By May 2026, it had raised $2 billion at a $20 billion valuation.

slide3_news.label: THE UPDATE
slide3_news.headline: Kimi K3: World's Largest Open AI Model
slide3_news.body: Moonshot released Kimi K3 on July 16, a 2.8 trillion parameter model, the largest open one ever. It jumped straight to #1 on a top coding leaderboard, beating both Claude and GPT-5.6.

slide4_why.label: WHY IT MATTERS
slide4_why.headline: The Price-Performance Gap Is Gone
bullets: Costs 5x less than Claude, and beats it
Nasdaq dropped 1.4% the day after launch
Full weights go free and open on July 27

slide5_engage.label: YOUR TAKE
slide5_engage.headline: If a Chinese open AI is #1 at coding and costs 5x less, why would any startup still pay for OpenAI or Anthropic?
slide5_engage.cta: Follow for daily breakdowns of the stories reshaping global business and tech.
